title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - WhiteHat Jr - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
